headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Regions Financial, Raises Price Target to $36
summary: Citigroup  analyst Benjamin Gerlinger   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Buy and raises the price target from $32 to $36.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Regions Financial, Raises Price Target to $36
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Benjamin Gerlinger   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Buy and raises the price target from $32 to $36.

headline: US FINANCIAL 15 SPLIT CORP. Preferred Dividend Declared
summary: TORONTO, July 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- US Financial 15 Split Corp ("US Financial 15") declares its monthly distribution of $0.07892 for each Preferred share, or 10.00% annually based on the previous month end net asset value. Distributions are payable August 10, 2026 to shareholders on record as at July 31, 2026. US Financial 15 invests in a portfolio primarily consisting of 15 U.S. financial services companies as follows: American Express, Bank of America, Bank of New York Mellon Corp., Cit

headline: DA Davidson Maintains Neutral on Regions Financial, Raises Price Target to $34
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Winter   maintains Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $33 to $34.

headline: Regions Financial (RF) Stock Could Be 46% Undervalued As Dividend Rises 13%
summary: Regions Financial stock has doubled investors' money over the past five years, yet the current checks send a mixed valuation message, with the Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while traditional earnings multiples suggest the share price is closer to fair value. Regions Financial has returned 100.9% over the last 5 years, which puts extra attention on whether the current share price still leaves room for attractive long term returns. Expectations for...
